zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Porhoët於大約1175年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林時，她的父親Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan54歲，母親Margaret De Porhoet32歲。她於1201年之前與Geoffroy de Fougères在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1239年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Porhoët于大约1175年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林时，她的父亲Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan54岁，母亲Margaret De Porhoet32岁。她于1201年之前与Geoffroy de Fougères在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1239年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Porhoët was born about 1175, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, was 54 and her mother, Margaret De Porhoet, was 32. She married Geoffroy de Fougères before 1201, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1239, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Porhoët est née environ 1175, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Porhoet, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroy de Fougères avant 1201, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1239, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Porhoët um 1175 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan 54 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Porhoet 32. Sie hat vor 1201 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich Geoffroy de Fougères geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1239 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Porhoët è nata il circa 1175 nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Porhoet, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroy de Fougères prima del 1201, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1239, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Porhoëtが約1175年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンで生まれた時，父Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohanは54歳，母Margaret De Porhoetは32歳であった。1201年以前にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスでGeoffroy de Fougèresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1239年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Porhoët(이)가 대략 1175년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Porhoet(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1201년 이전 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 Geoffroy de Fougères(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1239년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Porhoët nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Porhoet, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroy de Fougères antes 1201, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1239, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Porhoët родилась около 1175 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Porhoet, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroy de Fougères перед 1201 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1239 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Porhoët nació aproximadamente 1175, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Eudes de PORHOET II,   de Rohan, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margaret De Porhoet, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Geoffroy de Fougères antes de 1201, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1239, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
